name: The Prism
depiction: A beam of light refracting through a prism
effect: Immediately draw a card of each other suit 🌈

name: Wheel of Fortune
depiction: A colorful spinning wheel divided into strange symbols
effect: All creatures in a 1 mile radius suffer from an effect from the wheel. Roll a d6 ||[[d6]]||: 1-Heal [[4d8]] HP and one level of exhaustion, 2-The next crop harvest will have double yields, 3-Grant inspiration, 4-Range of all attacks halved for the next minute, 5-Speed halved for the next minute, 6-Knocked prone) 🎡

name: Mirrored Madness
depiction: A mirror hall at a funhouse filled with warped reflections
effect: For 10 minutes, creatures within one mile see illusions of themselves acting out their worst fears, causing all saving throws against fear effects to have disadvantage 😱

name: Tightrope Walk
depiction: A tightrope stretched between two trees with a clown walking upside down under it
effect: For the next minute, all creatures within a mile are buffeted by strange gravitational waves. Creatures who move more than half their speed on their turn must pass a DC [[2d6+6]] Dexterity Save or fall prone 🎪

name: Stolen Voice
depiction: A disembodied mouth with a bead of energy emerging from it
effect: For the next 10 minutes, all creatures within a mile have their voices replaced with that of a random creature of the same type 🙊

name: Lost in the Woods
depiction: A confused person standing seemingly right side up on the underside of a dense forest canopy
effect: For the next hour, the surrounding terrain seems to shift and change when not being looked at. Mundane and magical sensors seem to shift randomly, and the sky seems to slowly spin around. Navigating within the affected area is impossible without a DC [[2d6+6]] Survival Check

name: Oldest Joke in the Book
depiction: As you gaze at the card, your mind reels, unable to truly comprehend what it sees. You look away quickly. Was that... a clown monster? A horrid jester? A trickster god?
effect: ||It was never truly asleep||||, but now it stirs... ||🤡

name: Bounce House
depiction: A inflated bounce castle with a smiling face on it
effect: For the next hour, all creatures within a mile are affected by a strange gravity-altering effect. They can jump twice as high and far, but must succeed on a DC [[2d6+6]] Dexterity Save or be knocked prone when they land 🏰

name: Mirror of Truth
depiction: A mirror that seems to peer deep inside the mind of the viewer
effect: For the next hour, all creatures within a mile see illusions of what people think instead of what they are actually doing. Affected creatures have advantage on Insight checks, and disadvantage on Deception, Perception, and Persuasion checks 🪞

name: Jorrick's Mask
depiction: A porcelain mask with colorful makeup and a wide smile
effect: For the next minute, creatures within a mile find the mundane hilarious. Whenever a creature within the affected area makes a d20 test (other than a Save), they must pass a DC [[2d6+6]] Wisdom Save or burst into laughter, incapacitating them for one round 😂

name: Magician's Wand
depiction: A archetypal magician's wand with a corny star on the tip
effect: For the next hour, whenever a spell is cast within a mile, there is a 50% chance it will cause a wild magic surge 🪄

name: Carnival of Lights
depiction: A fun-looking, but ghostly, carnival with colorful lights and strange music playing
effect: For the next hour, open space within a mile is filled by a spectral carnival. Creatures within the area must succeed on a DC [[2d6+6]] Wisdom Save or be charmed by the carnival, causing them to engage with the carnival and be distracted by the sights and sounds. Any damage ends the effect for that creature 🎠

name: Fool's Whispers
depiction: A yelling mouth next to an ear
effect: For the next hour, all thoughts become audible whispers. Creatures within the area have disadvantage on Stealth, and Deception, and advantage on Insight checks 🗣️👂

name: Lucky Coin
depiction: A coin on its edge
effect: For the next minute, all creatures within a mile gain advantage on Saving Throws 🪙

name: A Good Laugh
depiction: A disembodied laughing mouth
effect: For the next minute, creatures within a mile roll a d4 at the beginning of their turn. on a 1, they spend their turn incapacitated, laughing uncontrollably 😂

name: The Web
depiction: A giant spider web with a grinning face woven in the center
effect: For the next minute, spidersilk rains from the sky within a mile, creating difficult (and flammable) terrain outdoors. Creatures outdoors within the area who did not move last turn must succeed on a DC [[2d6+6]] Dexterity Save or be restrained by the webs 🕸️

name: Mask of Madness
depiction: A twisted version of Jorrick's mask, with a sinister grin
effect: For the next hour, creatures within a mile are affected by a strange madness. They must succeed on a DC [[2d6+6]] Wisdom Save or be frightened of all other creatures, and have disadvantage on all attacks and ability checks against them. Affected creatures may attempt to save one per turn anytime they can't see another creature 😵

name: The Fool's Fortune
depiction: A hapless jester falling backwards into a pit of treasure
effect: Each creature within a mile must flip a coin. on a heads, they gain advantage on their next d20 test before the end of a long rest. On tails, they suffer disadvantage on their next d20 test before the end of a long rest 🎭

name: Night of the Living Clowns
depiction: A horde of ghostly clowns with glowing eyes
effect: All corpses that were once clowns within a mile rise as undead zombies 🧟

name: Shifting Sands
depiction: Dunes of multicolored sand shifting in the wind
effect: For the next minute, at the beginning of each creature within a mile's turn, they are teleported 5 feet in a random direction ⛱️

name: Double-Edged Sword
depiction: A sword with a blade that seems to shimmer and change color
effect: For the next minute, all creatures within a mile suffer from an ethereal weakness that gives a penalty of [[2d4]] to AC and Saving Throws ⚔️

name: Chaos Ballad
depiction: A swirling mass of musical notes floating in the air
effect: For 5 minutes, all creatures within one mile experience random emotional surges, gaining disadvantage on Insight checks and advantage on Persuasion checks 🔀

name: Jester's Gambit
depiction: A colorful jester juggling glowing orbs
effect: For 1 minute, creatures within one mile must succeed on a DC [[14+d4]] Wisdom save at the start of their turn or be afflicted by the confused condition until their next turn 🤡

name: Harlequin's Mirage
depiction: A dancing clown surrounded by flickering lights
effect: For 1 hour, illusions fill the area within one mile, causing all enemy creatures to suffer disadvantage on attack rolls unless they succeed on a DC [[13+d8]] Intelligence save 🎭

name: Patchwork Reality
depiction: A quilt made of shifting fabrics and colors
effect: For 10 minutes, all terrain within one mile is distorted, causing all cover to shift randomly at the start of each round, and creatures must succeed on a DC [[15+d6]] Dexterity save to avoid falling prone when moving 📍

name: Whispering Wind
depiction: A swirling gust with tiny glowing whispers
effect: All sounds within a mile are carried invisibly and indistinctly, causing disadvantage on Perception checks relying on sound for 30 minutes 🌬️

name: Luck’s Pendulum
depiction: A swinging pendulum with shifting symbols
effect: For 10 minutes, all attack rolls and saving throws by creatures within a mile have advantage or disadvantage, decided randomly each round by a coin flip 🎲

name: Jester's Folly
depiction: A colorful jester dangling from a crescent moon
effect: For 1 hour, all creatures within a mile radius must make a DC [[15]] Wisdom save at the start of their turn or act as if under the confusion spell for that turn 🤡

name: Fool’s Gambit
depiction: A playing card with a smiling skull
effect: Until the card bearer loses concentration, all spells cast within a mile radius have their effects randomly swapped with another spell of equal level happening simultaneously 🔄

name: Harlequin’s Grin
depiction: A grinning mask with sharp teeth
effect: For 1 minute, creatures within a mile radius compelled to laugh uncontrollably, each losing one action per turn unless they succeed a DC [[14]] Charisma save 😂

name: Jester's Chuckle
depiction: A grinning clown juggling glowing orbs
effect: For 1 hour, any creature within one mile that attempts an attack roll or saving throw must succeed on a DC [[15+d4]] Wisdom save or the result is treated as a natural 1 🤡

name: Crowd's Whimsy
depiction: A crowd of laughing faces blending into the mist
effect: For 10 minutes, all creatures within one mile ignore social cues and react only with laughter or tears, imposing disadvantage on Charisma checks 😢😂

name: Fool's Gambit
depiction: A deck of cards scattered in midair
effect: Shuffle this card into the deck—once per day, the next card drawn from any deck has its effect doubled or reversed, chosen at random 🎲

name: Pandemonium's Veil
depiction: A swirling rainbow storm enveloping a village
effect: For 5 minutes, weather and natural phenomena behave unpredictably within one mile: rain falls upwards, fire burns cold, and animals speak gibberish 🌈

name: King of Jesters
depiction: A crowned clown sitting on a throne of cards
effect: You may command one target within one mile to perform a harmless but humiliating act (DC [[14+d6]] Wisdom save to resist) once per hour

name: Pandemonium Pulse
depiction: A swirling vortex of multicolored light
effect: Unleash chaotic energy in a 1-mile radius that causes all spells cast to have wild surges: roll [[d20]] on the Wild Magic Surge table for each spell cast in the area in the next 10 minutes 🌀

name: Fool's Fortune
depiction: A tattered deck of cards spilling glowing coins
effect: Each creature within one mile must roll a d20 and either gain advantage or disadvantage on the next roll or save they make within the next hour (determined randomly by the DM) 🎲

name: Mirror of Misstep
depiction: A cracked hand mirror showing distorted reflections
effect: For 10 minutes, all ranged attacks within one mile have their targets swapped randomly among creatures in the radius, including the attacker’s own allies 🎯

name: Laughing Mask
depiction: A grinning theatrical mask radiating chaotic energy
effect: For 1 minute, all creatures within one mile are overcome with uncontrollable laughter, becoming incapacitated and unable to take actions unless they succeed on a DC [[14]] Constitution save 😂

name: Clown’s Chaos
depiction: A painted clown face with a wide grin
effect: For 10 minutes, all ranged attacks within one mile have their damage dice rolled upside down (e.g., a 6 counts as 1, 5 as 2, etc.) 🎭

name: Fool’s Fortune
depiction: A tattered card displaying a smiling fool
effect: Once pulled, roll [[1d20]] to determine a random beneficial or harmful effect within one mile lasting 5 minutes (effects range from sudden gusts of wind, random teleportations, to bursts of inspiration granting advantage on skill checks) 🎲

name: Mirror of Mirth
depiction: A hand mirror reflecting a weeping clown
effect: All creatures within one mile must succeed on a DC [[13+d6]] Charisma saving throw or begin uncontrollably laughing for 1 minute, incapacitated and unable to take actions 😂

name: Card of the Balancing Trick
depiction: A jester juggling glowing orbs
effect: For 10 minutes, all creatures within one mile must reroll one attack or saving throw of their choice and take the second result instead 🃏

name: Jester’s Gambit
depiction: A colorful clown flipping a coin
effect: The card user can choose one minute during the day to cause a random beneficial or harmful effect affecting all creatures within one mile, determined by rolling a d6: 1-2 = healing [[2d8]] HP, 3-4 = poison condition, 5 = gain advantage on all saves, 6 = disadvantage on all attacks 🤡

name: Fool’s Mirage
depiction: A blurry, shifting figure dancing on a hill
effect: For 10 minutes, visibility within one mile is halved and all ranged attacks beyond 30 feet have disadvantage as the environment flickers and shifts like a mirage 🌫

name: Laughing Shadows
depiction: A group of shadowy figures laughing and pointing
effect: For 5 minutes, all enemies in the radius have disadvantage on attack rolls as unseen laughter distracts them, but allies suffer disadvantage on Stealth checks due to the same laughter 🗣️

name: Cacophony of Chaos
depiction: A horn blowing clouds of vibrant smoke
effect: For 10 minutes, all sound within one mile is distorted causing disadvantage on Perception checks relying on hearing and all verbal spell components have a 50% chance to fail 🔊

name: Fool's Luck
depiction: A smiling clown flipping a coin
effect: Once drawn, the next roll made by any creature within one mile is made with advantage, but after that roll, that creature must succeed on a DC [[15]] Wisdom save or become confused (as the confusion spell) for 1d4 rounds 🎲

name: Mirror Mask
depiction: A smiling mask split into light and shadow halves
effect: For 30 minutes, everyone within a one mile radius swaps appearances randomly, forcing all social checks to be made with disadvantage due to identity confusion 😵

name: Carnival of Misrule
depiction: A chaotic parade of masked figures and fireworks
effect: For 1 hour, all unexplained magical effects within one mile become wild surges, triggering random wild magic effects when a spell is cast or magical ability used 🎆

name: Circle of Chaos
depiction: A swirling vortex of multicolored smoke
effect: For 10 minutes, the environment within one mile becomes wildly unpredictable—dice rolls for movement, damage, or perception checks are all made with disadvantage or advantage, chosen randomly by the DM 🎲

name: Mirror Masquerade
depiction: A mask with changing faces
effect: For 30 minutes, everyone within one mile has their appearance altered randomly each hour, causing confusion and potential social advantage or disadvantage 🪞

name: Moonlit Masquerade
depiction: A masked ball under a full moon
effect: For 30 minutes, everyone within 1 mile gains the effects of Disguise Self altering appearance unpredictably every 10 minutes, causing confusion and mistaken identity 🎭

name: Wild Card Gambit
depiction: A card burning on one end and freezing on the other
effect: Roll a d4: 1-cold snap, area within 1 mile takes [[2d8]] cold damage and movement halved

name: Chaos Jester
depiction: A mischievous jester juggling glowing orbs
effect: For 1 hour, all creatures within 1 mile must succeed a DC [[15]] Wisdom saving throw or behave as if affected by the Confusion spell, shifting randomly between friend and foe 🤡

name: Grinning Harlequin
depiction: A clown’s face painted with an eerie grin
effect: For 10 minutes, all attacks within 1 mile have a 25% chance to instead heal the target for [[1d8+3]] hit points rather than deal damage 🤡

name: Fool’s Lottery
depiction: A chaotic lottery wheel with colorful numbers
effect: Each creature within 1 mile rolls either one boon or one bane condition determined by a coin flip—heads grants advantage on next ability check, tails imposes disadvantage on next save 🎲

name: The Jester’s Jest
depiction: A grinning jester juggling colorful orbs
effect: For 1 hour, all creatures within one mile must succeed on a DC [[15]] Wisdom saving throw or uncontrollably laugh, becoming incapacitated and unable to take reactions for 1d4 rounds 🤡

name: Chaos Carnival
depiction: A swirling carnival tent appearing in a forest clearing
effect: For 10 minutes, the terrain and obstacles within one mile shift randomly every minute, creating confusing and shifting cover and hazards for all creatures 🎪

name: Mirror of Madness
depiction: A hand mirror reflecting distorted faces
effect: Creatures within one mile perceive allies as enemies and vice versa for 10 minutes, requiring DC [[14]] Charisma saves to act normally 🪞

name: Prankster’s Wind

effect: For 1 hour, sound travels backward and speech reversed in meaning within one mile

name: Jester’s Mirage
depiction: A whimsical jester with shifting, blurred colors
effect: For 1 hour, within a 1-mile radius, all creatures must roll a DC [[15+d4]] Wisdom save or see illusions of harmless pranks and tricks causing disadvantage on Perception checks and ranged attacks 🤡

name: Whimsy’s Gambit
depiction: A colorful wheel spinning wildly
effect: For 10 minutes, anyone who enters the 1-mile radius must make a DC [[13+d6]] Dexterity saving throw or randomly teleport within the area, determined by [[1d20]] feet in a random direction 🔄

name: Chaos Bell

effect: Rings the bell to cause natural terrain in the 1-mile radius to randomly shift and change, creating difficult terrain zones for 10 minutes 🌪️

name: Broken Mirror Laugh
depiction: A shattered carnival mirror reflecting distorted faces
effect: For 30 minutes, creatures in the 1-mile radius hear indistinct laughter that imposes disadvantage on Stealth checks and causes disadvantage on saving throws against being frightened 😈

name: Fools’ Feast
depiction: A table set with feast that never ends
effect: During 1 hour in the 1-mile radius, all food and drink provide double the benefits, but all healing spells have a 50% chance to either heal or harm an equal amount ❤

name: Court Jester's Revel
depiction: A colorful jester juggling glowing orbs
effect: For 1 hour, all creatures within one mile must succeed on a DC [[14+d4]] Wisdom save at the start of each turn or be compelled to perform a random silly action (laugh, dance, or tell jokes) for that turn 🤡

name: Pandemonium Burst
depiction: A chaotic explosion of multicolored lights in a swirling storm
effect: Upon drawing, creatures within one mile gain advantage on attack rolls but also suffer disadvantage on saving throws for 1 minute 🌪

name: Fool's Mirage

effect: The environment within one mile appears warped and transformed as if a carnival has sprung up

name: Whispering Madness
depiction: A swirling mass of colorful, whispering smoke
effect: All creatures within one mile must succeed on a DC [[15+d6]] Intelligence saving throw or be affected by short-term madness for 1 minute 🤯

effect: For 10 minutes, random minor wild magic surges occur within 1 mile: roll a d8 each round for a random effect such as teleportation, bursts of fire, or strange illusions (effects vary and are DM determined) 🌪️

name: Laughing Glass
depiction: A cracked mirror with a clown’s wide grin etched into it
effect: All creatures within 1 mile hear uncontrollable laughter causing disadvantage on Stealth and Sleight of Hand checks and grants advantage on Deception and Performance checks for 10 minutes 🤡

effect: Within one mile for 5 minutes, all creatures hear uncontrollable laughter, granting all saving throws disadvantage but advantage on saving throws against being frightened 🤡

effect: For 10 minutes, all allies in 1 mile regain [[1d4+2]] hit points at the start of their turn while enemies lose [[1d4]] hit points instead 💫

effect: All whispers and secret communications within 1 mile are clearly audible to all for 30 minutes, removing stealth from verbal conversation 🕊️

name: Lucky Misfortune

name: Mirror of Misfortune
depiction: A cracked hand mirror reflecting a twisted visage
effect: For 10 minutes, all ranged attacks within one mile have their damage type changed randomly to fire, cold, lightning, or acid each time they hit 🔮

name: The Laughing Fool
depiction: A clown’s mask with a wide, eerie grin
effect: For 5 minutes, creatures within one mile must succeed on a DC [[14]] Charisma save or be compelled to laugh uncontrollably, unable to take actions other than laughter 😆

name: Ripple of Madness
depiction: A swirling vortex of colorful smoke
effect: For 30 minutes, all creatures within one mile have their alignment shifted one step toward chaotic (e.g., lawful good becomes neutral good) and act unpredictably but not hostilely 🤪

name: Carnival Chaos
depiction: A swirling carnival tent with flickering lights
effect: For 5 minutes, within one mile, every creature’s movement speed is randomly altered each turn—roll a d4 at the start of each creature’s turn (1=half speed, 2=normal, 3=double, 4=teleport 10 feet in a random direction) 🎪

name: Inverted Fortunes
depiction: A card showing a coin flipped mid-air
effect: For 10 minutes, within one mile, all healing spells and effects instead deal damage equal to [[1d8 + spell level]] and all damaging spells heal that much instead 🔄

name: Mirthquake
depiction: A laughing clown holding a cracked, glowing orb
effect: Once pulled, within one mile, all creatures must succeed on a DC [[15+d4]] Wisdom save or be overcome with uncontrollable laughter, becoming incapacitated and prone for 1 minute 😂

name: Twisted Reflection
depiction: A warped carnival mirror reflecting distorted versions of creatures
effect: For 10 minutes, all creatures within one mile see illusions of their own worst fears

name: Fickle Breeze
depiction: A swirling wind carrying colorful leaves
effect: Within one mile, erratic gusts of unpredictable wind rage for the next ten minutes. All ranged attacks are made at disadvantage in the affected area🍃

name: Turnabout Whimsy
depiction: A twisted carnival mirror reflecting multiple versions of a person
effect: For 5 minutes, all creatures within one mile swap positions randomly at the start of their turn as if affected by a confused maneuver, DC [[14]] Wisdom save negates 🤹

name: Silent Whispers
depiction: A cracked whispering mask exuding eerie silence
effect: For 15 minutes, no sound can be produced or heard within one mile except whispers, verbal spells without somatic components are cast at disadvantage 🤫

name: Card of Jocular Chaos
depiction: A painted jester juggling glowing orbs
effect: For 1 hour, creatures within one mile must roll a d4 when making attack rolls or ability checks: 1 - advantage, 2 - disadvantage, 3 - reroll, 4 - success regardless of roll 🎭

name: Whispers of the Fool
depiction: A whispering wind swirling with faint laughter
effect: For 1 hour, all secrets or hidden knowledge within one mile are revealed to creatures with darkvision or truesight, but prone to misinterpret them leading to false conclusions 50% of the time 🕵️

name: The Red Nose’s Blessing
depiction: A bright red clown nose floating above a painted wooden box
effect: The bearer and all creatures within one mile have advantage on Performance and Persuasion checks for 30 minutes, but all stealth checks are made with disadvantage 🤡

name: Laughter’s Curse
depiction: A sinister grin painted on a cracked mask
effect: All creatures within one mile burst into uncontrollable laughter for 1 minute unless they succeed on a DC [[15]] Wisdom saving throw, causing incapacitation and inability to speak 😂

name: Clown’s Shadow
depiction: A clown with an impossibly long shadow
effect: One mile radius sees all shadows behave unpredictably: they may act independently, mimicking or mocking their owners’ last movement, causing disadvantage on Insight checks to read intentions for 1 hour 🃏

name: Chaos Flux
depiction: A swirling vortex of colors and shapes
effect: For 1 minute, all spells cast within one mile randomly change type (DM chooses or roll d8: 1-fire, 2-cold, 3-lightning, 4-thunder, 5-necrotic, 6-radiant, 7-force, 8-acid) but retain their original effect and save DC ⚡

name: Twisted Revelry
depiction: A carnival tent under a starry sky
effect: For 10 minutes, the terrain within one mile is transformed into carnival-like scenery, granting all creatures advantage on Charisma (Performance) checks but disadvantage on Stealth checks 🎪

name: Pandemonium's Whisper
depiction: A swirling vortex of chaotic colors
effect: For 10 minutes, magic within one mile has a 50% chance to produce a random wild magic surge effect whenever a spell is cast 🎲

name: Cacophony’s Call
depiction: An ancient horn carved with laughing faces
effect: When sounded, all sound within one mile is amplified and distorted for 10 minutes, causing disadvantage on Stealth checks and Concentration saving throws involving sound 🗣️

name: Mirrored Misstep
depiction: A prism reflecting fractured light
effect: For 1 minute, all movement within one mile is unpredictably altered—when creatures move, roll [[1d6]]. On a 1-3, their movement direction reverses for that turn, otherwise it proceeds normally 🔄

name: Wild Laughter
depiction: A grinning clown face emitting radiant sound waves
effect: All creatures within one mile must succeed a DC [[14+d4]] Con save or burst into uncontrollable laughter for 1 minute, incapacitated but gaining advantage on all saving throws against being frightened 🤡

name: Moonlit Paradox
depiction: A silver moon twisted into a spiral
effect: For 30 minutes, creatures within one mile perceive time inconsistently, causing initiative order to be randomly shuffled at the start of each combat and a 25% chance of delayed reactions causing the next action to be skipped ⏳

name: Veil of Misdirection
depiction: A swirling fog of iridescent colors
effect: The area in a 1 mile radius is plagued with illusions for the next minute. All creatures in the area suffer disadvantage on Perception checks and ranged attacks for the duration🎭

name: Fool’s Coin
depiction: A tarnished coin with a smiling face on both sides
effect: Flipping this coin causes either a beneficial or detrimental event within one mile based on a luck roll: on heads all allies gain advantage on saving throws for 10 minutes, on tails all enemies gain advantage on attack rolls for 10 minutes, roll [[1d2]] 🎲

name: Whims of the Jester
depiction: A colorful jester juggling glowing orbs
effect: For 5 minutes, one random creature within one mile per round experiences a random condition (confused, frightened, charmed, blinded, or deafened) determined by a roll of [[1d5]] 😊😈🤡

name: Echoes of Folly
depiction: A whispering clown mask suspended in the air
effect: For 10 minutes, all sound within one mile is doubled and echoes, causing disadvantage on Stealth checks and causing verbal spells to require concentration checks DC [[15]] 🎭

name: Luck's Gambit
depiction: A twisted coin with a smiling and frowning face
effect: Once drawn, every creature within one mile must roll a d20 and add [[1d4]] to or subtract [[1d4]] from the result (player's choice) on all attack rolls and saving throws for 10 minutes 🎲

name: Moonlit Mirage
depiction: A pale, laughing moon with shifting faces
effect: For 30 minutes, illusions are indistinguishable from reality within one mile, causing all Insight checks related to perception of reality to be made at disadvantage 🌝

name: Dance of Chaos
depiction: A swirl of multicolored smoke enveloping a town
effect: For 1 hour, all movement within one mile becomes erratic and unpredictable

name: Laughing Mirage
depiction: A laughing clown face painted on a swirling mist
effect: For 10 minutes, illusions manifest randomly in a 1 mile radius—creatures must succeed on a DC [[14]] Intelligence save or believe any sensory illusion is real

name: Fool’s Errand
depiction: A parchment with a tangled map and a grinning fool
effect: For 30 minutes, all navigation and directional magic within 1 mile becomes unreliable—compasses spin wildly and teleportation destinations shift randomly

name: Fool’s Whimsy
depiction: A swirling pattern of vibrant colors and distorted shapes
effect: For 30 minutes, the environment within one mile shifts randomly every 10 minutes, altering terrain features and light levels, causing disadvantage on perception checks relying on sight or sound 🔮

name: Prankster’s Gambit
depiction: A deck of cards with a smiling clown on the back
effect: All creatures within one mile must roll a d20 when they take a long rest: on a 1-5, they suffer 1d6 psychic damage and are confused for 1 minute, on a 6-15 nothing happens, 16-20 they gain advantage on one attack roll or saving throw of their choice before their next long rest 🤡

name: Twist of Fate
depiction: A twisting carnival ride with vivid lights
effect: For 10 minutes, all damage dealt or healing received within one mile is reversed in type—fire damage heals, healing damages, and so forth, to the nearest whole number 🔄

name: Harlequin's Gambit
depiction: A vibrant jester juggling glowing orbs
effect: All creatures in the area must roll a d20 and on an even result gain advantage on their next roll, on an odd result suffer disadvantage on their next roll, lasting until the next dawn 🎭

name: Infinite Jest
depiction: A swirling vortex of colorful streamers and jesters
effect: The cardholder and all allies within the radius regain [[2d8+4]] hit points as they are filled with euphoric energy, but each healed target must succeed on a DC [[13]] Con save or lose their next turn laughing uncontrollably😂

name: Chaotic Mirth
depiction: A laughing clown holding a horn that emits colorful confetti
effect: For 1 hour, any hostile action within the mile radius causes uncontrollable laughter, forcing targets to succeed on a DC [[15]] Wis saving throw or be incapacitated and laughing for 1d4 rounds 🤡

name: Fool’s Whisper
depiction: A cracked mask with an eerie grin
effect: For 30 minutes, all secret or private thoughts within one mile unintentionally become audible whispers, causing disadvantage on Stealth and Deception checks 🤫

name: Harlequin's Veil
depiction: A colorful patchwork cloak fluttering with mischievous shadows
effect: For 10 minutes, creatures of your choice within one mile experience illusions that make them appear as harmless or bizarre creatures, granting advantage on social interactions but causing enemies to hesitate before attacking 🤡

name: Chaotic Pulse
depiction: A swirling vortex of multicolored light
effect: For 1 hour, all magic cast within one mile has a 50% chance to produce a wild magic surge effect determined by the DM at random ✨

name: The Laughing Curse
depiction: A grinning clown face carved into a bone mask
effect: For 10 minutes, all creatures in a 1-mile radius uncontrollably laugh, giving them disadvantage on attack rolls and saving throws but advantage on Charisma (Performance) checks 😂

name: Mirror of Fool's Insight
depiction: A cracked mirror reflecting a distorted face
effect: For 30 minutes, all creatures in a 1-mile radius see false visions causing advantage on Insight checks but disadvantage on Perception (sight) checks 🔮

name: Pandemonium Breeze
depiction: A swirling, vibrant wind carrying faint laughter
effect: For 1 hour, the wind reverses gravity for flickers of seconds randomly on creatures within one mile, forcing a DC [[13]] Dexterity save or fall prone as if pulled upward briefly 🌪️

name: Fool's Errand
depiction: A winding road twisting into a question mark
effect: For the next hour, all travel within one mile is disoriented: creatures navigating must succeed on a DC [[15]] Wisdom (Survival) check or be redirected to a random location within the area 🛤️

name: Balancing Act
depiction: A tightrope stretched between two distant trees with a clown walking it
effect: For 30 minutes, creatures within one mile have their movement affected by wild gravity shifts, forcing them to succeed on DC [[13]] Dexterity saving throws to avoid falling prone when moving more than half their speed 🎪

name: Laughing Roulette
depiction: A painted card with a laughing skull face
effect: When drawn, creatures within one mile must roll a d20: on evens they receive a random beneficial effect (heal [[2d8+4]] hp, advantage on next attack, etc.), on odds they suffer a random hindrance (disadvantage on next save, [[1d6]] psychic damage, etc.) 🎲
